arts.ttl: Lamine Yamal seals La Liga title for Barcelona with win over Espanyol
arts.sum: Espanyol 0-2 Barcelona: Hansi Flick’s Barca team moved seven points clear of Real Madrid with only two games left to play

arts.ttl: Barcelona crowned LaLiga champions as Lamine Yamal nets stunner in win over Espanyol
arts.sum: Hansi Flick’s side wrap up title with two games to spare after derby victory

arts.ttl: Espanyol vs. Barcelona: Harrowing footage emerges of car ploughing into crowds leaving '13 injured'
arts.sum: Thirteen people have reportedly been left injured after a car ploughed through a crowd of people before Espanyol and Barcelona's La Liga clash.

arts.ttl: Watch: Espanyol attempted to stop Barcelona’s La Liga title celebrations on the club’s pitch
arts.sum: Those behind the scenes at Espanyol did their utmost to put a stop to the title celebrations of arch rivals Barcelona on Thursday evening. This, of course, comes fresh off…
